violations.text: The loading dock door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with: 1) The bottom vents at the deli and meat cases have an accumulation of dust. 2) The fan cover in the dairy walk-in cooler was observed with an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation debris: 1) The honey comb vents of an open air display unit had dust and/or biofilm 2) The area behind the fans had an accumulation of dust 3) The vents of the produce open air display units had an accumulation of dust New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The following areas were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The inside of several light covers in the back storage room areas had an accumulation of dust 2) The base of the wall in direct contact with the mop sink had an accumulation of black debris New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The wall and wooden base of a shelving unit was observed in poor repair/poor condition. The seal between the mop sink and wall is exposed causing a gap between the two and wooden base was observed with heavy moisture and black biofilm accumulation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
